_source.methodology: For Office, the WholeBuilding aggregate (already area-weighted across spaces) is used. For Warehouse, an area-weighted average is computed from the DOE prototype space ratios (70% Bulk + 20% Fine + 10% Office). For other building_types, the primary representative space_type is used (peak-load space, not area-weighted average) because OpenStudio Standards does not publish a WholeBuilding aggregate for them. To compute true area-weighted whole-building values would require parsing the prototype space-type ratios from lib/openstudio-standards/prototypes/, which is left as future work.

Warehouse.method: area-weighted across prototype DOE warehouse space ratios (70/20/10)

Retail.method: primary sales floor; back-of-house spaces typically <2 per 1000ft^2

Hospital.method: primary patient room; ER spaces are 20x higher (peak)

MidriseApartment.method: primary dwelling unit (commercial template); residential workflow uses HPXML bedrooms+1 formula instead

HighriseApartment.method: primary dwelling unit (commercial template); residential workflow uses HPXML bedrooms+1 formula instead
